message:
feat(widgets): add Badge widget for compact status labels

Introduce Badge, a minimal single-line label widget with configurable
styling and padding. Designed for status indicators, priority labels,
and similar compact UI elements.

Features:
- Zero per-render heap allocations (draws directly to Frame)
- Configurable left/right padding (default: 1 cell each)
- Full Style support (foreground, background, attributes)
- Automatic truncation for narrow areas
- Safe for zero-width/zero-height areas (no-op render)

API:
- Badge::new(label) → default styled badge
- .with_style(Style) → set colors and attributes
- .with_padding(left, right) → adjust horizontal padding

Uses unicode-width for correct grapheme width calculation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
